name: Tracking one-in-a-million microbial single-cell tracking benchmark
access_format: Zip archives containing Cell Tracking Challenge-format annotations and videos
schema_mapping: Tracks can map to cell_id,time,condition,signal after extracting motion, growth, division, or activity-like trajectory features
biological_value: Tests whether RhoDyn can analyze residence-style dynamics in live-cell trajectories outside the manuscript use case
nature_methods_value: Strong primary tutorial candidate because it is live-cell, public, annotated, time-resolved, and methodologically aligned with dynamic-state analysis
notes: Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7260136; version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7260137; files listed as ctc_format.zip and videos.zip

name: A distributed coding logic for thermosensation and inflammatory pain
access_format: Trace and metadata CSV files containing deltaF/F0 calcium traces for individual DRG neurons
schema_mapping: Trace rows map to cell_id,time,condition,signal,replicate after splitting 200-frame calcium episodes
biological_value: Provides an independent public live-cell signaling benchmark where peak calcium and high-calcium residence can be compared
nature_methods_value: First Stage 3A signaling benchmark; demonstrates amplitude-only and residence-only top-quartile cases without using manuscript data
notes: Uses sstlineage_ly_drg_traces.csv and sstlineage_ly_drg_info.csv; DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14907827; raw source CSV files are fetched in memory and not retained

name: Cell Painting Gallery
access_format: S3 bucket containing microscopy images, extracted features, and metadata
schema_mapping: Feature tables can map to endpoint or reserve-like summaries; image-derived profiles can serve as static morphology comparators
biological_value: Tests the distinction between static phenotype profiles and dynamic trajectory-derived state variables
nature_methods_value: Strong commercial-friendly public resource and useful for a morphology-vs-dynamics tutorial, but not a live signaling dataset
notes: Use as a static-state comparator rather than as evidence for residence dynamics

name: From Pixels to Phenotypes: Integrating Image-Based Profiling with Cell Health Data Improves Interpretability
access_format: CSV files containing scaled Cell Painting features and nine MitoTox biological endpoint labels
schema_mapping: Endpoint rows map to model,endpoint,observed,predicted,weight after leave-one-compound-out reduced-architecture prediction
biological_value: Provides a public perturbation endpoint case where reduced morphology architectures can be compared against routed compartment summaries
nature_methods_value: Stage 3C endpoint/model-comparison benchmark; shows that endpoint prevalence and one-dimensional morphology summaries miss endpoint structure retained by a routed compartment architecture
notes: Uses Cell_Painting_data_658_compounds_827_Features_scaled.csv and Endpoints_9_Mitotox_biological_activities_658_compounds.csv; DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10011861; source CSV files are fetched in memory and not retained

name: Allen Brain Observatory visual coding 2-photon calcium imaging
license: Open data with SDK under Allen Institute noncommercial software terms
access_format: NWB files accessed through AllenSDK with raw fluorescence, neuropil, demixed, and dF/F traces
schema_mapping: dF/F traces can map to trajectory tables; stimulus metadata can map to condition and replicate fields
biological_value: Tests calcium-dynamics compatibility with RhoDyn trajectory, reserve, and first-passage summaries
nature_methods_value: Scientifically valuable calcium-dynamics tutorial candidate, but commercial licensing terms need legal review before product use
notes: Good fit for dynamics, but not ideal as first profitable-software exemplar until reuse terms are confirmed

name: Single cell imaging of ERK and Akt activation dynamics and heterogeneity induced by G protein-coupled receptors
access_format: Figure source archive containing single-cell ERK and Akt KTR trajectory CSV files
schema_mapping: CN_ERK trace rows map to cell_id,time,condition,signal,replicate after selecting bounded DMSO-control ligand subsets
biological_value: Provides an independent public ERK/KTR benchmark where peak kinase activity and high-ERK residence can be compared
nature_methods_value: Stage 3B kinase-signaling benchmark; demonstrates amplitude-only and residence-only top-quartile cases outside calcium and manuscript data
notes: Uses Figure_3.zip member CSVs ALL_UK.csv, ALL_S1P.csv, and ALL_His.csv; DOI 10.5281/zenodo.5836623; source ZIP and member CSV files are fetched in memory and not retained

name: NF-kB public live-cell dynamics dataset candidate
access_format: Expected nuclear translocation or reporter time series if suitable dataset is identified
schema_mapping: Would map to cell_id,time,condition,signal with stimulus dose or ligand as condition
biological_value: Would test inflammatory signaling dynamics outside the microglia manuscript context
nature_methods_value: High-value immunology target, but not shortlisted until source URL, license, and schema are verified
notes: Do not claim support until an accessible licensed dataset is identified
